chemistry.defaultPrompt: Create a guided study session for {courseTitle} with a 30-minute plan, 5 review questions, and common lab mistakes to avoid.

sessions.prompt: Create a pre-lab readiness session for {courseTitle} with checklist, key formulas, and 5 practice prompts.

sessions.title: Report Writing Coach
sessions.desc: Improve claim-evidence-conclusion writing for lab reports.
